title: Advanced Features
description: Fitur lanjutan Redis: Pub/Sub, Transactions, Lua Scripting, Streams, dan Persistence.

commands.name: SUBSCRIBE / PUBLISH
commands.title: Pub/Sub Messaging
commands.description: Sistem messaging publish/subscribe untuk real-time communication.
commands.syntax:
SUBSCRIBE channel [channel ...]
PUBLISH channel message
PSUBSCRIBE pattern [pattern ...]
commands.examples:
# Terminal 1: Subscriber
SUBSCRIBE chat:general
PSUBSCRIBE news:*

# Terminal 2: Publisher
PUBLISH chat:general "Hello everyone!"
PUBLISH news:tech "Redis 8.0 released!"
commands.notes: Pub/Sub fire-and-forget — pesan hilang jika tidak ada subscriber. Gunakan Streams untuk durability.

commands.name: MULTI / EXEC
commands.title: Transactions
commands.description: Menjalankan beberapa command secara atomic (semua atau tidak sama sekali).

options.description: Optimistic locking — batalkan jika key berubah

commands.examples:
# Transaction sederhana
MULTI
SET account:1:balance 900
SET account:2:balance 1100
EXEC

# Optimistic locking
WATCH account:1:balance
val = GET account:1:balance
MULTI
SET account:1:balance (val - 100)
EXEC  # return nil jika key diubah oleh client lain
commands.notes: WATCH memberikan optimistic locking — transaction dibatalkan jika watched key berubah.

commands.name: EVAL (Lua)
commands.title: Lua Scripting
commands.description: Menjalankan script Lua secara atomic di server Redis.
commands.examples:
# Atomic rate limiter
EVAL "
  local count = redis.call('INCR', KEYS[1])
  if count == 1 then
    redis.call('EXPIRE', KEYS[1], ARGV[1])
  end
  return count
" 1 ratelimit:user:1 60

# Get and delete
EVAL "return redis.call('GET', KEYS[1]); redis.call('DEL', KEYS[1])" 1 temp_key
commands.notes: Lua scripts atomic — tidak ada command lain yang berjalan selama script dieksekusi.

commands.name: XADD / XREAD (Streams)
commands.title: Redis Streams
commands.description: Append-only log data structure untuk messaging dan event sourcing.
commands.syntax:
XADD key [MAXLEN n] * field value [field value ...]
XREAD [COUNT n] [BLOCK ms] STREAMS key id
commands.examples:
# Producer
XADD orders * product "laptop" quantity 1 price 15000000
XADD orders MAXLEN 1000 * product "mouse" quantity 2

# Consumer: baca semua
XRANGE orders - +
XRANGE orders - + COUNT 10

# Consumer: blocking read
XREAD BLOCK 0 STREAMS orders $

# Consumer group
XGROUP CREATE orders mygroup 0
XREADGROUP GROUP mygroup consumer1 COUNT 1 STREAMS orders >
XACK orders mygroup 1234567890-0
commands.notes: Streams lebih baik dari Pub/Sub karena persistent, consumer groups, dan acknowledgment.

commands.name: BGSAVE / RDB / AOF
commands.title: Persistence
commands.description: Konfigurasi persistence agar data tidak hilang saat restart.
commands.examples:
BGSAVE
LASTSAVE
BGREWRITEAOF

# redis.conf
# RDB: save setiap 60 detik jika ada 1000 perubahan
save 60 1000

# AOF: enable
appendonly yes
appendfsync everysec
commands.notes: Kombinasi RDB + AOF memberikan durability terbaik. AOF untuk data loss minimal.
